notes.creep-owner-undefined: xxscreeps Creep has 'owner' as a key but the value is undefined. creep.my works but creep.owner.username throws.
notes.extension-rcl-capacity: xxscreeps StructureExtension.store.getCapacity('energy') returns 200 at every RCL. isActive()-based filtering now works correctly upstream (RCL 1 extensions report inactive and contribute 0 to room energy), so the gap has narrowed to just the capacity table.
notes.describe-exits-topology: xxscreeps Game.map.describeExits only returns exits whose neighbor room was instantiated in the current shard. Vanilla returns all four coordinate-derived neighbors regardless.
notes.pathfinder-suboptimal: xxscreeps PathFinder picks a 35-step zigzag where vanilla finds a 29-step straight diagonal on open plains from (10,10) to (39,39).
notes.tombstone-corpse-rate: xxscreeps tombstones preserve floor(store * CREEP_CORPSE_RATE) on both suicide and ticksToLive death paths. Vanilla preserves the full store on both paths and also reclaims body energy on suicide at high remaining TTL.
